articles.title: A new AI model for probing fusion plasma behavior

articles.title: IBM has a time-series model for every task
articles.summary: New versions of our popular time series models are best-in-class for point and probabilistic forecasting, and leaders in efficient inferencing.

articles.title: Toward a transparent supply chain for AI
articles.summary: IBM Granite 4.0 has new machine-readable disclosures that are a first step toward a broader AI “bill of materials” that documents how the models were built, trained, validated, and will be deployed.
